name: bearlymail-batch-analyzer-lambda
description: Lambda function for parallel context batch analysis via SQS

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r prompts dist/prompts && cp package.json package-lock.json dist/ && cd dist && npm ci --omit=dev && rm -f package.json package-lock.json
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../function.zip .
